LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO ENFORCE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO 664.6 CCP IS GRANTED ACCORDING TO THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AND AS MODIFIED TO INCLUDE $10.00 NOTARY FEE FOR A TOTAL OF $1,510.00. THE COURT FINDS THAT INTEREST IS NOT APPROPRIATE. PURSUANT TO 225(B) RULES OF COURT, THE COURT ENTERS A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST PLAINTIFF FRANCIS FAHY. MOTIONS FOR SANCTIONS: THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS ACTED FRIVOLOUSLY AND IN BAD FAITH, AND THAT THIS IS AN APPROPRIATE CASE FOR SANCTIONS; SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT SUNSET SERVICE AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF FAHY IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,386.30 ($1,350.00 SANCTION PLUS $36.30 COSTS); THIS AMOUNT SHALL BE DEDUCTED FROM THE TOTAL SETTLEMENT AMOUNT OF $1,510.00. ATTORNEY HAGUE SHALL PROVIDE PLAINTIFF FAHY THE SUM OF $123.70 AT HER EARLIEST CONVENIENCE. A WRITTEN ORDER AS REQUIRED BY CCP 128.5(D) AND CRC 227(D) WILL BE PREPARED BY THE COURT AND FILED FORTHWITH. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2004 Off Calendar

MOTION To Enforce Settlement By Defts; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Merrilee C. Hague, Esq., Law Offices Larry D. Langley (415) 732-4150 for Defendants and Moving Party
Francis Fahy, Plaintiff Propria Persona and Opposing Party (415) 759-9834
RULING:
Motion To Enforce Judgment pursuant to 664.6 CCP is GRANTED according to the terms of the settlement and as modified to include $10.00 notary fee for a total of $1,510.00. The Court finds that interest is not appropriate. Pursuant to 225(b) Rules of Court, the Court enters a Dismissal With Prejudice against Plaintiff Francis Fahy. Motions for Sanctions: The Court finds that Plaintiff has acted frivolously and in bad faith, and that this is an appropriate case for sanctions; sanctions are imposed in favor of the Defendant Sunset Service and against Plaintiff Fahy in the amount of $1,386.30 ($1,350.00 Sanction plus $36.30 costs); this amount shall be deducted from the total settlement amount of $1,510.00. Attorney Hague shall provide Plaintiff Fahy the sum of $123.70 at her earliest convenience. A written order as required by CCP 128.5(d) and CRC 227(d) will be prepared by the Court and filed forthwith. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
